featureName: Bearer Auth Scope Claim & RequireScope Middleware (Spec 044 Amendment)

completedPhaseClaims.summary: Implemented PASETO scope claim end-to-end: added internal/auth/scopes.go canonical registry (RegisteredScopeSurfaces=['extension'], ScopeNameRegex, ValidateScopeName, ExtractScopeSurface, IsRegisteredScopeSurface), extended Session.Scopes / ParsedToken.Scopes / IssueOptions.Scopes / IssueAndPersistOptions.Scopes, added ErrScopeClaimMalformed + getScopeClaim defense-in-depth parser, wired bearerAuthMiddleware to copy parsed.Scopes into Session on the per-user PASETO branch. Unit + integration tests green (TestValidateScopeName, TestIssueToken_SetsScopeClaim, TestVerifyAndParse_NilScopesForLegacyToken, TestVerifyAndParse_MalformedScopeClaimFallsBackToNil, TestBearerAuthMiddleware_PopulatesSessionScopes). Live-stack ./smackerel.sh test integration: 294 PASS / 0 FAIL.

Implemented auth.RequireScope middleware + metrics: internal/auth/scope_middleware.go exporting RequireScope(required ...string) with AND semantics, construction-time panic on zero required, 500 middleware_misconfigured on absent session, SessionSourceSharedToken + SessionSourceBootstrap bypass with auth_scope_check_bypassed_total counter, 403 scope_required body + first-missing required label + auth_scope_rejected_total counter + structured WARN log; registered AuthScopeRejected and AuthScopeCheckBypassed in internal/metrics/auth.go. BS-002 adversarial headline regression test green (legacy token rejected, counter delta exactly 1). Zero endpoint wiring (spec 058 will wire its own). Unit + integration green (294 PASS / 0 FAIL via ./smackerel.sh test integration).

Implemented CLI scope surface: cmd/core/cmd_auth.go gained --scope (repeatable via flag.Func) + --allow-unknown-surface escape hatch on both runAuthEnroll and runAuthRotate; runAuthRotate gained --prior-token <wire> for the preserve path; new runAuthInspect subcommand wired into runAuthCommand dispatch; pure-logic helpers validateScopeFlags + resolveRotationScopes + buildAuthVerifyOptions + issueAndPersistWithScopes added. smackerel.sh gained an auth) passthrough case forwarding "$@" verbatim via smackerel_compose exec smackerel-core smackerel auth, with usage banner updated. New cmd/core/cmd_auth_test.go with 13 pure-logic test functions covers: BS-005 invalid scope name (7 sub-cases), BS-006 unknown surface + escape hatch, BS-008 preserve refuse + preserve roundtrip + legacy prior token safety, BS-009 demote + mixed-sentinel rejection, repeatable flag accumulation, explicit replace + explicit replace rejection. go build ./... CLEAN; go vet ./cmd/core ./internal/auth ./internal/api CLEAN; go test ./cmd/core ./internal/auth PASS. Uncertainty: passthrough wrapper live-stack integration test (tests/integration/cli_auth_passthrough_test.go) and dedicated TestAuthInspect_* tests intentionally deferred.

Implemented operator docs: docs/Operations.md gained a new '### Scoped Token Enrollment (Spec 060)' subsection inserted after the manual-enrollment block (mint with --allow-unknown-surface escape-hatch behavior, three rotation modes preserve/replace/demote with the at-source refusal rule, auth inspect pure verification path, migration notes, scope registry maintenance, initial RequireScope endpoint wiring matrix). docs/API.md gained a new '### 403 scope_required (Spec 060)' subsection in the Error Behavior section (response shape, first-missing-vs-full-diff semantics, anonymous-vs-authenticated distinction, shared-token/bootstrap bypass, misconfigured-router 500 middleware_misconfigured body, auth_scope_rejected_total + auth_scope_check_bypassed_total metrics with label cardinality, initial wiring matrix) plus a 2026-05-28 Change Notes row. All examples use generic placeholders only. Uncertainty: regression-baseline-guard and pii-scan formal runs deferred to the next dispatch before flipping the spec to done.

executionHistory.summary: Authored spec.md as analyst-owned amendment to spec 044 (which is Done — terminal specs not edited in place). Defines `scope` PASETO claim + `auth.RequireScope(...)` middleware contract to unblock spec 058 OQ-DSN-1. Captured actors (Operator, Human user, bearerAuthMiddleware, RequireScope, spec 058 ingest handler), 4 use cases, 9 business scenarios (BS-001..BS-009) including BS-002 adversarial legacy-token rejection on wired endpoints, competitive analysis (OAuth 2.0 scope, GitHub fine-grained PATs, AWS IAM session tags), platform direction, domain capability model (AN5 — scoped-capability token primitive), and three design open questions (OQ-DSN-AMD-1..3). Closes OQ-DSN-1 from spec 058 once `bubbles.design` + `bubbles.plan` advance this spec.

Authored design.md covering: PASETO claim schema extension (`scope: []string` payload claim, footer unchanged), `auth.Session.Scopes` + `auth.ParsedToken.Scopes` wiring, `auth.RequireScope(required ...string) func(http.Handler) http.Handler` middleware signature/behavior (AND semantics, 403 scope_required body shape, structured WARN log, anonymous-leak guard), OQ-DSN-AMD-1 resolved AND, OQ-DSN-AMD-2 resolved no-op for SessionSourceSharedToken/Bootstrap, OQ-DSN-AMD-3 resolved single registry at internal/auth/scopes.go, CLI surface (`auth enroll --scope` repeatable, `auth rotate --scope` with `--prior-token` for preserve, `auth inspect` operator affordance, `--allow-unknown-surface` escape hatch), backward compatibility hard invariant for legacy unscoped tokens, two new metrics (auth_scope_rejected_total, auth_scope_check_bypassed_total) with closed-set label cardinality, integration + unit + adversarial regression test mapping for BS-001..BS-009, zero SST keys / zero DB schema change. All three analyst open questions resolved in §5; no design open questions remain.

Authored scopes.md (4 sequential scopes), scenario-manifest.json (SCN-060-001..SCN-060-020), report.md stub, uservalidation.md baseline. Scopes: (1) PASETO scope claim + Session/ParsedToken wiring + canonical registry at internal/auth/scopes.go; (2) auth.RequireScope middleware + metrics (AuthScopeRejected, AuthScopeCheckBypassed) with BS-002 adversarial regression headline; (3) CLI --scope/--allow-unknown-surface/--prior-token flags + rotation preserve/demote sentinel + auth inspect + ./smackerel.sh auth passthrough wrapper; (4) docs/Operations.md scoped enrollment subsection + docs/API.md 403 scope_required response shape + design §9 wiring matrix. Resolved design §7.4 deferred question in favor of the passthrough wrapper per planning packet preference. Scenarios map 1:1 to BS-001..BS-009 plus supplemental coverage (wire-format roundtrip, parse-time malformed defense, construction panic, 500-on-absent-session, label-cardinality, passthrough-wrapper smoke, doc presence). All scopes ship zero new SST keys, zero DB schema changes, zero endpoint wiring of RequireScope on pre-existing endpoints (spec 058 wires its own). Spec 060 unblocks spec 058 once implemented.

Implemented Scopes 1 and 2 (the spec-058 unblocker). Scope 1 — PASETO scope claim foundation: internal/auth/scopes.go canonical registry, Session.Scopes + ParsedToken.Scopes + IssueOptions.Scopes + IssueAndPersistOptions.Scopes, ErrScopeClaimMalformed defense-in-depth parser, bearerAuthMiddleware session-population wire. Scope 2 — auth.RequireScope middleware + AuthScopeRejected/AuthScopeCheckBypassed counter vectors, AND semantics, construction panic, 500-on-misconfig, shared-token+bootstrap bypass, BS-002 adversarial regression headline (legacy token MUST 403 with counter delta exactly 1). Hard backward-compat preserved: legacy unscoped PASETO tokens continue to validate (Scopes: nil). Zero new SST keys, zero DB changes, zero endpoint wiring on pre-existing routes (spec 058 wires its own). Test evidence: full ./smackerel.sh test unit green; full ./smackerel.sh test integration green (294 PASS / 0 FAIL on disposable test stack). Scopes 3 (CLI) and 4 (docs) intentionally deferred to a follow-up per dispatch scope.

Implemented Scopes 3 (CLI) and 4 (operator docs). Scope 3: cmd/core/cmd_auth.go gained --scope (repeatable via flag.Func) + --allow-unknown-surface + --prior-token flags on enroll/rotate, new runAuthInspect subcommand, pure-logic helpers validateScopeFlags + resolveRotationScopes + buildAuthVerifyOptions + issueAndPersistWithScopes. smackerel.sh gained an auth) passthrough case (smackerel_compose exec smackerel-core smackerel auth "$@") with usage-banner update. cmd/core/cmd_auth_test.go (new, 13 pure-logic test funcs) covers BS-005/BS-006/BS-008/BS-009 + repeatable-flag accumulation + legacy-roundtrip safety. Scope 4: docs/Operations.md '### Scoped Token Enrollment (Spec 060)' subsection (mint, three rotation modes, inspect, migration, registry maintenance, initial wiring matrix); docs/API.md '### 403 scope_required (Spec 060)' subsection (response shape, first-missing semantics, bypass behavior, metrics, wiring matrix) + Change Notes row. go build ./... CLEAN; go vet ./cmd/core ./internal/auth ./internal/api CLEAN; go test ./cmd/core ./internal/auth PASS. Spec status flipped to in_progress (NOT done) because two DoD items remain in Uncertainty Declaration territory: (a) passthrough-wrapper live-stack integration test (tests/integration/cli_auth_passthrough_test.go) was NOT added or run; (b) regression-baseline-guard + pii-scan for Scope 4 docs were NOT executed. Both gaps are honestly recorded in scopes.md with Claim Source tags; closing them is the next dispatch.
